lessons.title: Free Movement of Workers — Article 45 TFEU: Scope, Rights and Limitations
lessons.description: Free movement of workers is guaranteed by Article 45 TFEU, and its detailed implementation is set out primarily in Regulation 492/2011.

lessons.title: Workers — Family Members, Jobseekers and Rights After Employment
lessons.description: In our last lesson we examined who qualifies as a worker and what rights that status confers.

lessons.title: Derogations — Public Policy, Security, Health and Expulsion Safeguards
lessons.description: Article 45(3) TFEU states that the rights guaranteed by free movement of workers may be limited on grounds of public policy, public security or public health.
